payload.answer: Did not commit the note because 'Brutto' is ambiguous between the existing restaurant entity and the article alias.
citations: New note: Brutto was better than expected

entity_resolution.reason: The note 'Brutto was better than expected' refers to 'Brutto' but existing candidates include both a Brutto restaurant in London and a Brutto article alias. The note lacks enough context to safely resolve which entity is intended.

details: No durable memory was written due to ambiguous entity resolution.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided treating either existing entity as the current referent.

repair_options: Clarify whether 'Brutto' refers to the restaurant in London or the article alias.
If this refers to the restaurant, specify: 'Brutto restaurant in London was better than expected.'
If this refers to the article, specify: 'The Brutto article was better than expected.'
